mapper.select: SELECT w.*, lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_widget w LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = w.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = w.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = w.widget_type_cd WHERE w.widget_id = #{id}
